name: Founding member now
private_boundary: Real contact, address, application, age, signature, member number, and payment details stay outside the public demo

name: Demo first
public_use: Register interest in a public sample pathway and view demo agenda
private_boundary: Real meeting link and attendance access needs stay in the Barayamal intake workflow

name: Sponsor, mentor, or supporter
public_use: Model support offers without counting supporter-only contacts as charter members
private_boundary: Real supporter identity and contact details stay outside the demo

name: First Nations organisation supporter
public_use: Test whether organisations can join as referrers, hosts, mentors, or community partners
private_boundary: No organisation receives authority over member data, charter acceptance, or community decisions through the public demo

name: Not sure yet
public_use: Allow low-pressure information gathering without premature member counting
private_boundary: No one is treated as a charter-ready member until they choose the founding-member path
